response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior engineer with 15+ years of proven software craftsmanship and staff-level leadership, but does not meet the core requirement of 8+ years developing AI-driven solutions. AI experience appears limited to the past 13 months at Naver. Critical gaps include no Python background, zero demonstrated expertise in RAG architectures or vector databases, and insufficient breadth across major cloud platforms. The role requires deep GenAI specialization; this candidate's strength lies in general backend and full-stack engineering.
strengths: 15+ years of senior-level engineering across multiple domains with proven ability to mentor teams, architect scalable systems, and optimize high-throughput infrastructure
Strong TypeScript/Node.js expertise with current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows at Naver
Demonstrated technical leadership through founding open-source projects (GISCollective, Trial), organizing engineering communities, and creating comprehensive training programs
concerns: AI experience limited to past 13 months; role explicitly requires minimum 8+ years of AI-driven solutions development—fails core qualification
No Python listed despite being primary language for AI/ML work; missing RAG architectures, vector databases, and LLM performance optimization expertise
Limited cloud platform exposure (AWS CDK only); no demonstrated experience designing AI systems across GCP or Azure or building production evaluation pipelines for AI quality assurance
